intended_use: ClearRead CT CAC is image processing software designed to aid physicians in assessing coronary artery calcification on non-gated, non-contrast, standard, or low-dose chest CT scans of adult patients 3
intended_use_full: ClearRead CT CAC is image processing software designed to aid physicians in assessing coronary artery calcification on non-gated, non-contrast, standard, or low-dose chest CT scans of adult patients 30 years of age or older.
ground_truth: Consensus ground truth review by three radiologists for CAC category determination and manual outlining of regions associated with coronary artery calcification including particular artery assignment
other_metrics: Primary endpoint: quadratic weighted Kappa coefficient 0.959 (95% CI: 0.943-0.975); Positive Percent Agreement (PPA) and Negative Percent Agreement (NPA) stratified by CAC category (see Figure 3); Secondary endpoint Bland-Altman limits of agreement: -12.20 ± 437.84; Dice score comparison: 0.910 (0.893, 0.927) and 0.892 (0.871, 0.911)
